summary: Fixed pagination navigation styling to match design specifications
userRevisions: Remove borders from page numbers by default
Add hover effect with gradient background + border + perfect circle shape
Remove hover effect from current page and dots (non-clickable items)
Fix progress bar: gray track with gradient fill only on current segment

changes.description: Removed default borders from page numbers, changed to 40x40 perfect circles, added gradient background + border on hover (not for .current or .dots)
Added progress bar container styles (4px height, rounded 10px, gray track rgba(31,31,29,0.5)) and updated fill styling
Removed inline Tailwind classes from progress bar container (moved to CSS)

technicalNotes: Page numbers now use w-10 h-10 min-w-10 min-h-10 for perfect circle (40x40px)
Removed old min-w-[71px] min-h-[61px] px-8 py-6 for rectangular cells
Added flex items-center justify-center for proper text centering in circles
Current page uses bg-charcoal/50 text-charcoal pointer-events-none
Hover effect uses :not(.current):not(.dots) to exclude non-clickable items
Progress bar container moved from inline Tailwind to dedicated CSS for precise Figma values
Progress bar track: rgba(31,31,29,0.5) matches Figma spec exactly
Progress bar fill uses CSS custom property --progress for dynamic width

verification.accessibility: maintained (ARIA attributes, keyboard support, screen reader announcements)
